description: Legal document(s). Location: Fustat. Dated: 5 Ṭevet 1[4]21 Seleucid, which is November 1109 CE. May have to do with a mercantile partnership. Mentions (at least) 50 dinars, then Rūmī dinars, then a separation. Signed by Avraham b. Shemaʿya and Yiṣḥaq b. Shemuel ha-Sefaradi. On verso there is an addendum, mentioning (at least) 500 of something—so maybe the case was about a sum of 550 dinars—with the same signatories.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
